_comment: PREDEFINED Phase 5 human-speech beta thresholds. Fixed BEFORE the first baseline run (see docs/editor-v2-phase5-speech-eval.md). Do NOT weaken after seeing results; a miss is a real finding. Any change requires a documented engineering justification, never gaming for green.
_minFillerRecall_note: ADDED for the round-2 rerun as a newly-discovered product-quality requirement (perfect precision with 0.22 recall does not deliver the filler-removal feature). Committed at 0.50 BEFORE the rerun; paired with the bridge suppress_tokens=[] change so Whisper emits disfluencies. Not to be tuned after seeing results.
_round3_notes: Run 29751818139 (head 89bcf11) FAILED two gates honestly: fillerRecall 0.167 (base model rarely emits um/uh at all — capability limit, precision 1.0) and offScriptRetentionRatio 0.825 end-to-end (decomposition: ALL 11 drops were ASR transcription misses concentrated in far-field noise; ZERO editor removals). Reviewer decisions 2026-07-20, made BEFORE the round-3 rerun: (1) upgrade the SHIPPED ASR model base->small (speech-3) and rerun against the SAME unchanged gates; (2) approved definition split for offScriptRetentionRatio — the >=0.90 gate measures editor-removal retention over ASR-transcribed off-script words; ASR word-miss is reported separately (offScriptAsrMissRatio, ungated). No threshold VALUES changed.
_round5_notes: Reviewer directive after the disfluency-prompt was introduced: a prompt-induced recall pass is NOT sufficient closure. STRENGTHENED gates (strengthening allowed, weakening never): minFillerPrecision 0.50->0.80; NEW maxFillerHallucinations=0 (filler tokens + filler candidates on the zero-filler clean set — the aggregate invented-word ratio is not a substitute); NEW minShortPausePreservation=1.0 (VAD-derived silence must never band a short emphasis pause as removable/dead air). Filler candidates additionally require independent acoustic evidence at the claimed timestamp (>=50% Silero-VAD speech overlap, Silero independent of Whisper) and no overlap with neighboring lexical words (speech-rules-3). Mandatory A/B (prompted vs unprompted, identical subset) reported. STOP-RULE: if recall>=0.50 with precision>=0.80 and zero hallucinations is not achievable, stop prompt-tuning, record Whisper as insufficient, and design an acoustically grounded disfluency detector in Phase 5.
_stoprule_outcome: FIRED at run 29755281447 (head d30e03a, artifact 8466518334). With the prompt + all acoustic safeguards: fillerPrecision 1.000 (n=6, ci [0.61,1.00]), fillerHallucinations 0, fillerCounts {tp:6,fp:0,fn:4}, but fillerRecall 0.333 (2/6, ci [0.10,0.70]) < 0.50. A/B verdict: 'prompt improves genuine recall without adding clean-speech filler tokens' (without prompt 0/6, with prompt 2/6, clean filler tokens 0 both). Whisper's LM omits most spoken um/uh -> a token-driven detector cannot reach the gate. Prompt-tuning STOPPED; filler-recall gate stays OPEN at 0.50 (NOT weakened). Path = numpy acoustic disfluency detector, designed in docs/editor-v2-phase5-disfluency-detector-design.md, tracked task #117. ALL OTHER round-5 gates PASSED on this head: meanWerClean 0.013, invented 0.000, offScriptRetention 1.000 (n=56), fillerPrecision 1.000, fillerHallucinations 0, falseStartPrecision 1.000, repetitionPrecision 1.000, silenceClassAgreement 1.000, deadAirDetection 3/3, shortPausePreservation 3/3, lowConfOnlyRemoval 0.
